data.title: USDD is listed on sTRX Vault and a limited-time promotion is launched
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, at 16:00 on April 15, USDD officially launched the sTRX Vault minting function, opening a new channel for users to earn efficient returns. Users can obtain sTRX income tokens by staking TRX in JustLend DAO, and deposit them in USDD Vault to mint USDD, enjoying the dual returns of JustLend DAO sTRX staking income and USDD up to 20% annualized return (APY). As a liquidity staking token, sTRX has both flexibility and continuous income characteristics, providing users with a stable value-added path. The launch of sTRX Vault further deepens the application of USDD in the TRON ecosystem, helping users to easily unlock multi-level income.
At the same time, USDD launched a 30-day limited TRX Vault minting promotion. Users mint and deposit USDD through TRX or sTRX Vault to enjoy a reduction in the stability rate and have the opportunity to enjoy gas fee subsidies. In addition, the USDD x JustLend DAO Taskon event was launched simultaneously. Users only need to complete the designated tasks and knowledge quiz tests from April 15 to April 29 to share a 500 USDD reward pool.

data.title: Galaxy Digital wallets withdraw 9,368 ETH from Binance and Bullish.com in the past hour
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to monitoring by on-chain analyst Ai Yi, Galaxy Digital's associated wallet withdrew 9,368 ETH from Binance and Bullish.com in the past hour, worth US$15.4 million, with an average withdrawal price of US$1,644.

data.title: Bitget Wallet announces support for Hemi mainnet, a modular blockchain network
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Web3 wallet Bitget Wallet announced that it officially supports the modular blockchain network Hemi mainnet, providing users with a more efficient digital asset management experience. Users can now conveniently transfer and receive assets on the Hemi chain through Bitget Wallet, and connect the wallet through the Hemi official website for cross-chain operations. In addition, Bitget Wallet is about to launch the Hemi Ecosystem Points event to unlock more gameplay and benefits for users.

data.title: Filecoin Completes V25 'Teep' Network Upgrade with Key Enhancements
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Filecoin has successfully completed its V25 'Teep' network upgrade. This update introduces significant improvements, including the simplification of Filecoin's economic model through FIP0100. A new daily fee structure has been implemented, offering storage providers more predictable and proportional economic incentives, with a reduction in Gas consumption by up to 30%.

Additionally, the upgrade incorporates transient storage via EIP-1153 in the FEVM and prepares for the activation of F3. The team will now proceed with passive testing of F3.

data.title: Amazon AWS Resolves EC2 Connectivity Issues in Asia-Pacific Region
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Amazon AWS reported connectivity issues affecting EC2 instances in the Asia-Pacific Northeast region (AP-NORTHEAST-1) during the early hours of Pacific Time. The disruption occurred between 12:40 AM and 1:43 AM due to simultaneous interruptions of both the main and backup power supplies in a single availability zone (apne1-az4).

The connectivity problem impacted the normal operation of EC2 instances, leading to increased error rates and delays for customers using instances in the affected area. Additionally, other AWS APIs relying on these EC2 instances may have experienced disruptions.

AWS engineers intervened automatically within minutes and promptly began troubleshooting and implementing corrective measures. The company assured that the issue is unlikely to recur. Currently, only a small number of instances remain deployed on hardware affected by the power outage.

Efforts are ongoing to restore all impacted instances and volumes. However, AWS recommends replacing any instances or storage volumes that have not yet been recovered to ensure immediate restoration.

The issue has been resolved, and services have returned to normal operation. At present, only Amazon Relational Database Service is reported to be affected.

data.title: Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launched projects DB, ethard, memecoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Bitget's on-chain transactions (Onchain) have launched projects such as DB, ethard, memecoin, CYBERWISH, FAIR3, and jobcoin. Users can start transactions by entering the on-chain transaction section on the App interface.

data.title: BNB Chain: PumpBTC received $280,000 in liquidity rewards, and the second batch of liquidity incentive plan has been completed
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BNB Chain announced that the second batch of its $100 million liquidity incentive plan has been successfully completed. PumpBTC (PUMP) received a liquidity reward of up to $280,000. 
Earlier news, the second batch of selected projects for the BNB Chain $100 million liquidity incentive plan was PumpBTC.

data.title: Binance, KuCoin, MEXC report service issues due to AWS network interruption
data.description:
Binance, KuCoin, MEXC and other exchanges and wallet providers are experiencing service issues due to a significant network interruption by Amazon Web Services (AWS). Centralized cryptocurrency exchanges (CEXs) have been hit by an AWS data center outage, which reported “connectivity issues” that affected at least 12 of its services on April 15. AWS Service health
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/binance-kucoin-mexc-aws-outage-crypto-service-issues?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitget PoolX and CandyBomb will soon list WCT
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget PoolX is about to launch the WCT project, with a total prize pool of 150,000 WCT. The lock-up channel is open from 19:00 on April 15 to 19:00 on April 22 (UTC+8), details are as follows:
WCT lock-up pool:
Total airdrop: 150,000 WCT
Personal lock-up limit: 2,500,000 WCT
In addition, you can participate in the CandyBomb special event, top up and share 650,000 WCT, the event is open from 19:00 on April 15 to 19:00 on April 22 (UTC+8). The WCT on-chain coin earning product will be launched at 18:00 on April 17 (UTC+8), with a yield of 4.78% APR.
